Headline: #50 Damen Temporary Southbound Reroute near Ashland/Summerdale
ShortDescription: SB 50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Edgewater, Clark, Foster, Ashland over regular route, due to street blockage near Ashland/Summerdale.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #50 Damen buses are temporarily rerouted via Edgewater, Clark, Foster, Ashland over regular route, due to street blockage near Ashland/Summerdale.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
